gather_intel: CIA OPS NOTICE [TS//SI]: Intelligence collection operation conducted.
reposition_fleet: Naval fleet repositioned in the strait.
press_conference: White House holds press conference on strait crisis.
adjust_sanctions: New sanctions imposed on Iranian entities.
escort_tankers: USN begins tanker escort operations through Strait of Hormuz.
precision_strike: BREAKING: US precision strike destroys IRGC fast boat pens at Bandar Abbas
spec_ops_raid: SOCOM: Special operations forces conduct raid on Iranian mining assets
air_strikes: FLASH: US launches sustained air strikes against Iranian military targets
sead_mission: US Wild Weasel missions knock out Iranian air defense network along coast
ground_troops: FLASH: US ground forces land on Iranian coast — Bandar Abbas secured
seize_islands: FLASH: USMC amphibious assault seizes Iranian-held islands in Strait of Hormuz
full_mobilization: FLASH: President orders full military mobilization. Draft authorization sent to Congress.
demand_un_session: US demands emergency UN Security Council session on Strait of Hormuz.
escalate: ESCALATION: US military posture elevated to {escalationName}
deescalate: DE-ESCALATION: US military posture lowered to {escalationName}
issue_ultimatum: US issues formal ultimatum to Iran on strait freedom of navigation.
emergency_coalition: Emergency coalition meeting convened on strait crisis.
deploy_marines: US Marines deployed to secure strait positions.
combat_air_patrol: Combat air patrols established over the strait.
media_blitz: Media blitz pushes America First messaging.
